assembly_context.name: Battery_Pack_2P4S_Assembly
assembly_context.summary: 基于18650电芯(2并4串)的电池包装配体，包含下壳体、上壳体、独立电池支架及8节电芯模型。

global_coordinate_system.origin: Bottom_Case geometric center at bottom face

design_rules: All external sharp edges must have R2 fillets.
Wall thickness for plastic parts is 2.5mm.
Units are in mm, convert to meters for modeling code.
M3 screws are simplified as cylinders for assembly constraints.
assembly_sequence: Insert inst_cell_1 to inst_cell_8 into inst_cell_holder

part.name: Bottom Case
part.function: Main structural base holding cells and providing mounting points.
part.shape: Rectangular box with open top, internal ribs, semi-circular cell slots on inner bottom, and M3 screw posts on side walls. Bottom has 4 M4 mounting holes.

faces.name: face_bottom_outer
faces.purpose: Mounting reference to ground or chassis

axes.name: axis_screw_post_1
axes.purpose: Alignment axis for Top Case screw hole 1

axes.name: axis_screw_post_2
axes.purpose: Alignment axis for Top Case screw hole 2

axes.name: axis_screw_post_3
axes.purpose: Alignment axis for Top Case screw hole 3

axes.name: axis_screw_post_4
axes.purpose: Alignment axis for Top Case screw hole 4

assembly_relation_notes: Provides primary mating surfaces for Holder and Top Case.
standalone_modeling_instructions: Create base sketch on XY plane centered at origin, rectangle 140x75.
Shell inward by 2.5mm, keeping bottom face.
Add internal ribs and semi-circular slots for cells on the inner bottom face.
Add 4 cylindrical bosses (screw posts) on side walls or corners, height matching wall top.
Cut 4 M4 through-holes on the outer bottom face at corners.
Apply R2 fillet to all external vertical edges.
